final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a warm family dinner scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "温馨" and "烟火气" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong family dinner photography, 老照片 (old photo) nostalgic warmth, contemporary Chinese lifestyle illustration heritage; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a multi-generational family gathered around a round table, raising cups in celebration
Scene/backdrop: must include a Chinese round dining table with hot pot steaming, walls covered with family photos
Lighting/mood: needs a warm yellow lamplight atmosphere with cozy, happy mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm yellow direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
